attacking_style: Early breakaway specialist who targets KOM points from long-range moves rather than stage wins. Attacks focus on accumulating classification points across multiple climbs, not final-kilometer aggression.
team_tactics: Team employs passive jersey defense strategy, using domestiques to collect intermediate points and protect classification leads rather than controlling peloton tempo.
terrain_preference: Medium mountain stages with multiple categorized climbs that allow breakaway survival and KOM point accumulation. Less effective on explosive summit finishes where GC riders engage.
vulnerability: Dropped from finale groups when pace intensifies; prioritizes breakaway survival over contesting stage victories, limiting winning opportunities to non-GC days.
key_patterns: Consistently targets KOM jersey through breakaways across multiple stage races (4 observations)
Accepts being caught for stage win if KOM points secured (3 observations)
Team supports jersey defense via domestique point collection, not peloton control (2 observations)
Abandons GC ambitions to maximize breakaway opportunities and classification points (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2022 Paris-Nice showed sustained ability to defend KOM jersey across multiple stages but repeatedly dropped from winning groups, suggesting solid but not peak form
